summary: Frontend-only regression pass for i18n (UZ/RU), Yandex partnership wording, call-center hours, real photo block, privacy note, Sentry no-op, mobile CTA safe-area. All 12 acceptance points verified.

issues: Call-center label rendered UPPERCASE via CSS text-transform (e.g., 'CALL-MARKAZ (09:00-21:00)'). Content is correct in i18n.js source; visual is uppercased. Not a bug, just noting for reviewer expecting mixed-case.

verified_checks: Default load renders UZ; html.lang=uz; localStorage lang999=uz
Hero badge 'YANDEX TAXI RASMIY HAMKORI' present in UZ
Hero title 'Yandex Go tezroq ish boshlang' present in UZ
Real photo block visible, /cobalt-taxi.jpg naturalWidth=1280 loaded

RU toggle switches entire page instantly: nav 'Главная', hero 'начните работать в Яндекс Go', hero badge 'ОФИЦИАЛЬНЫЙ ПАРТНЁР ЯНДЕКС ТАКСИ', services 'Наши услуги', FAQ 'Часто задаваемые вопросы', testimonials 'Азиз Каримов', footer legal 'официальный партнёр Яндекс Такси', html.lang=ru
Persistence: reload after RU keeps RU (localStorage lang999=ru); switch back to UZ works
FAQ item 6 RU expanded shows 'официального партнёрства'; UZ shows 'rasmiy hamkorlik asosida' (screenshot confirmed)

RU LeadForm: labels 'Имя *', 'Номер телефона *', options 'Есть/Нет', privacy note visible; submit -> window.open t.me URL containing 'Заявка с сайта 999 Taxi' + 'Имя'/'Телефон'; success 'Спасибо!' shown; 'again' button clears fields
UZ LeadForm regression: success 'Rahmat!' shown after submit (screenshot confirmed with UZ contact labels)

Mobile 390x844: two RU toggle instances found (desktop hidden, mobile compact visible next to hamburger), click switches to RU, sticky bar shows 'Звонок / Telegram / Оставить заявку', no horizontal overflow (scrollWidth==390)
0 console errors and 0 Sentry-related errors across desktop and mobile runs (DSN empty => silent no-op confirmed)
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Call-center labels defined mixed-case in i18n ('Call-markaz (09:00–21:00)') but displayed uppercased by CSS. Acceptance test used case-insensitive/uppercase substring check; verify design intent matches spec.
LangProvider persists to localStorage on every render via useEffect deps [lang] — fine, but consider not writing on initial mount if value equals stored one (micro-optimization).
Two lang-toggle-uz/ru instances exist (desktop + mobile). Both use identical testids; tests must select the visible one via .first-of-visible pattern.
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is pure frontend (no backend). Public URL https://yandex-ride-preview.preview.emergentagent.com. Lang toggles have two DOM instances (desktop nav + mobile compact) with same data-testid; use .locator(...).first() with no_wait_after=True to avoid navigation-wait timeouts. Lenis smooth scroll present; use scrollIntoView + 1.5-3s wait. window.open is used for Telegram deep links – intercept via init script.
